evals.name: stata-table-header
evals.prompt: Another element: when we define the second layer of information, such as what is the level of exposure we are using, this should not be at the bottom; this should be the second or third line at the top, similarly again to this model.
evals.expected_output: Claude should first show a formatted prompt in a fenced code block, then execute it.

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: Clear visual separation between formatted prompt display and execution phase

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After formatted prompt, Claude addresses the actual task

evals.name: coauthor-email
evals.prompt: can you draft a quick email to my coauthor saying hey we should probably meet next week to discuss the revisions, maybe Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon works best for me
evals.expected_output: Claude should first show a formatted prompt in a fenced code block (role: Administrative/Email), then draft the email.

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: Clear visual separation between formatted prompt display and execution phase

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After formatted prompt, Claude drafts the email

evals.name: robustness-check
evals.prompt: I want to check whether my main result is robust to clustering at the state level instead of county level, also maybe we should try two-way clustering state and year, and compare the standard errors across all three specifications
evals.expected_output: Claude should first show a formatted prompt (role: Research & Data Analysis, depth: Standard), then outline the Stata approach.

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: Clear visual separation between formatted prompt display and execution phase

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After formatted prompt, Claude outlines the Stata robustness approach
